name: Test Generation
description: Generate unit, integration, and edge-case tests for backend routes and frontend components.
checklist: Read existing test files to match framework and style
Cover happy path first, then error cases
Test 404 response when resource not found
Test 400 response for missing required fields
Mock external calls (LLM, Python backend) where possible
Use descriptive test names: describe + it('should ...')
Do not import private/internal functions — test via API
Verify tests pass before marking done
Add test to the correct test file or create new one following naming convention
example_tasks: Write pytest tests for the new suggestion endpoints
Add edge-case tests for autopilot session management
common_failure_modes: Test depends on real DB state (not isolated)
Missing auth token causes 401 in test
Test file not discovered by test runner (wrong naming)
Async test missing await causes false positive
output_format: Test file matching project framework (pytest / vitest / jest)
